name: Salesforce
oneLiner: Salesforce is a comprehensive cloud-based platform that provides customer relationship management (CRM) and sales solutions, along with extensive tools for service, marketing, analytics, and custom application development.
apiSurface: Salesforce offers a broad range of APIs, including REST, SOAP, Bulk, Metadata, Connect REST, Tooling, UI, and Analytics APIs, allowing programmatic access to data and functionality for operations like CRUD, invoking custom actions, and integrating with external systems.

name: HubSpot
oneLiner: HubSpot is a comprehensive CRM and sales platform that offers extensive REST APIs and webhooks for managing customer relationships, sales, marketing, and customer service, allowing for deep integration and customization.
apiSurface: Broad REST API with date-based versioning (e.g., 2026-03), covering core CRM objects (Contacts, Companies, Deals, Tickets), marketing, sales, service, and CMS functionalities, with extensive endpoints and webhook support.

name: Pipedrive
oneLiner: Pipedrive is a cloud-based sales CRM platform designed to help businesses manage sales pipelines, track customer relationships, and automate sales processes.
apiSurface: Broad RESTful API covering core CRM entities like deals, leads, organizations, activities, and notes, with both v1 and v2 available and OpenAPI specifications.

name: Attio
oneLiner: Attio is a customizable, data-driven CRM platform that enables developers to build integrations, automations, and data pipelines using its REST API, App SDK, and AI-centric Managed Control Plane (MCP).
apiSurface: broad REST, many endpoints covering objects like companies, persons, deals, users, workspaces, and custom objects, with full read/write access and webhook support.

name: Twenty
oneLiner: Twenty is an open-source, highly customizable CRM offering both self-hosted and cloud options, featuring robust REST and GraphQL APIs, webhooks, and an "Apps" framework to build custom extensions, including AI agents and skills.
apiSurface: Comprehensive REST and GraphQL APIs are available for both Core CRM data (e.g., people, companies, opportunities, custom objects) and Metadata (e.g., schema management, custom fields). The API is dynamically generated based on the workspace schema, ensuring broad coverage. It supports batch operations and provides real-time updates via GraphQL subscriptions and webhooks.

name: Podio
oneLiner: Podio is a customizable work management and collaboration platform that allows teams to build tailored applications, automate workflows, and manage projects and CRM activities without coding.
apiSurface: broad REST API, providing a complete programmable interface to all Podio functionality, including interactions with items, tasks, files, and webhooks.

name: Zoho CRM
oneLiner: Zoho CRM is a comprehensive cloud-based CRM solution that helps businesses manage sales, marketing, and customer support, offering features like automation, analytics, and an AI assistant.
apiSurface: Zoho CRM offers a broad API surface primarily through RESTful endpoints for CRUD operations on CRM modules (e.g., Leads, Contacts, Deals), metadata, bulk actions, and notifications. It also provides GraphQL APIs, a Query API (COQL), and various SDKs.

name: Close
oneLiner: Close is a robust CRM and sales platform designed for sales teams to streamline activities, manage leads, contacts, and opportunities, and automate outreach with built-in calling, SMS, email, and AI tools.
apiSurface: Broad REST API covering leads, contacts, opportunities, activities, custom fields, webhooks, and more, with an explicit Multi-Channel Protocol (MCP) server for AI agent integrations.

name: Copper
oneLiner: Copper is a CRM software designed for businesses using Google Workspace, offering lead and contact management, email tracking, and task automation to streamline customer relationship management.
apiSurface: broad REST, covers core CRM entities like accounts, users, leads, opportunities, companies, and activities with JSON-formatted responses.

name: DealCloud
oneLiner: DealCloud is a preeminent CRM, deal management, and business development software for principal investing and M&A advisory professionals, offering comprehensive REST APIs for custom integrations, workflow automation, and advanced use cases.
apiSurface: Broad REST API surface covering authentication, user management, schema, data manipulation (create, retrieve, update, delete records across various objects like deals, contacts, companies), backups, real-time event publications, and relationship intelligence. It provides both columnar (Cells) and record-based (Rows) views for data, and includes a Swagger page for API testing.
blocker: API key generation requires an existing DealCloud account with system admin role access.

name: Zendesk
oneLiner: Zendesk is a customer service and engagement platform offering tools for support, helpdesk, ticketing, and CRM, with extensive APIs for integration and custom development.
apiSurface: Broad REST API surface covering multiple products and capabilities including Ticketing, Help Center, Live Chat, Voice, Sales CRM, AI Agents, Messaging, and Custom Data, with Postman collections available for most APIs.

name: Intercom
oneLiner: Intercom is an AI-powered customer service solution that enables businesses to facilitate personalized and timely communication with clients through various channels, and allows developers to extend its functionality via APIs and SDKs.
apiSurface: broad REST, with extensive endpoints for managing users, leads, conversations, articles, tickets, and AI content, including a dedicated Fin Agent API. The API is auto-generated from an OpenAPI specification, indicating a well-defined and broad surface.

name: Freshdesk
oneLiner: Freshdesk is a cloud-based customer support platform that provides a ticketing system, automated workflows, a knowledge base, and self-service portals to enable companies to provide great customer service.
apiSurface: broad REST, with numerous endpoints for managing tickets, conversations, agents, time entries, ticket forms, and more.

name: Front
oneLiner: Front is an AI-powered customer operations platform that centralizes customer communication across multiple channels into a collaborative workspace, enabling teams to manage and automate customer interactions.
apiSurface: broad REST, covering core entities like conversations, contacts, inboxes, and channels, with dedicated APIs (Core API, Channels API) for extensive read/write operations and custom channel creation. An OpenAPI spec is available for the Channel API.

name: Pinterest
oneLiner: Pinterest is a social media platform that provides a REST API for accessing pins, boards, ads, catalogs and related resources.
apiSurface: REST API covering pins, boards, ads, catalogs, and user accounts. It allows for managing content and advertising campaigns.
blocker: Production access for apps requires an approval process.

name: Threads (Meta)
oneLiner: The Threads API enables developers, brands, and creators to programmatically manage their Threads presence, publish content, and track performance metrics.
apiSurface: Graph API for publishing posts, retrieving media, managing replies, and viewing insights. Covers profile information and engagement data.
blocker: Production access for apps requires Meta App Review and specific account types (e.g., Instagram Business Account).

name: SendGrid
oneLiner: SendGrid is a cloud-based email platform that provides email delivery services for transactional and marketing emails.
apiSurface: Comprehensive REST API for sending emails, managing contacts, templates, and analytics.

name: Shopify
oneLiner: Shopify is an e-commerce platform that allows businesses to create online stores and manage their sales, products, and customers.
apiSurface: Extensive REST and GraphQL APIs for managing products, orders, customers, inventory, payments, and storefronts.

name: WooCommerce
oneLiner: WooCommerce is an open-source e-commerce plugin for WordPress, enabling users to create and manage online stores.
apiSurface: Comprehensive REST API for managing products, orders, customers, and coupons within a WooCommerce store.

name: BigCommerce
oneLiner: BigCommerce is a robust, open SaaS e-commerce platform that provides businesses with tools to build, manage, and scale their online stores.
apiSurface: Extensive REST and GraphQL APIs (Storefront API, Management API, Webhooks) covering products, orders, customers, categories, and payments.

name: Salesforce Commerce Cloud
oneLiner: Salesforce Commerce Cloud is an enterprise-grade e-commerce platform offering comprehensive solutions for managing online storefronts, customer experiences, and global retail operations.
apiSurface: Wide range of RESTful APIs (Shop API, Data API, Open Commerce API) for storefront operations, data management, and integrations.
blocker: Enterprise-level product requiring specific contracts or partnerships for API access.

name: Magento (Adobe Commerce)
oneLiner: Magento, now known as Adobe Commerce, is a powerful e-commerce platform that offers flexible solutions for building and managing online stores.
apiSurface: Extensive REST and GraphQL APIs for managing products, orders, customers, inventory, and various aspects of an e-commerce store.

name: Squarespace
oneLiner: Squarespace is a popular website builder that offers tools for creating professional websites, online stores, portfolios, and blogs with integrated design and e-commerce functionalities.
apiSurface: REST APIs for orders, inventory, and products, along with GraphQL APIs for customer profiles and commerce operations.

name: Ecwid
oneLiner: Ecwid is an e-commerce platform designed to easily add an online store to any existing website, blog, or social media profile, providing tools for product management, orders, and payments.
apiSurface: REST API for managing products, orders, customers, categories, and more, offering comprehensive e-commerce operations.

name: Gumroad
oneLiner: Gumroad's API exposes core resources for creators to sell digital products, courses, memberships, and software licenses, and manage sales, subscribers, and webhooks.
apiSurface: REST API with 26 endpoints covering product creation and management, offer codes, license key generation and verification, sales and subscriber lookups, custom fields, and webhooks.

name: Amazon Selling Partner
oneLiner: The Amazon Selling Partner API (SP-API) is a REST-based API that helps Amazon sellers and vendors programmatically access their data for orders, shipments, payments, and much more, enabling automation and integration with Amazon's marketplace.
apiSurface: REST-based API with extensive endpoints covering listings, orders, shipments, payments, reports, inventory, and more.
blocker: Admin approval / developer registration process for full access.

name: fanbasis
oneLiner: FanBasis offers a complete API for managing checkout sessions, webhooks, customers, subscriptions, and discount codes for digital content, creator memberships, and software, and provides enterprise payment orchestration and multi-rail payouts.
apiSurface: REST API with endpoints covering checkout sessions, webhooks, customers, subscriptions, discount codes, payments, and payouts.

name: DataForSEO
oneLiner: DataForSEO provides a comprehensive API stack for SEO and SEM, offering programmatic access to vast amounts of data including SERP results, keyword metrics, backlinks, and advertising data.
apiSurface: Extensive REST API covering various SEO and SEM data points: Google/Bing SERP, Google/Bing Ads, Google Trends, Keyword Data, Backlinks, On-page, etc.

name: SE Ranking
oneLiner: SE Ranking offers Data API for pulling raw SEO and marketing data (keywords, backlinks, domain data) and Project API for automating and managing SEO projects.
apiSurface: REST API with endpoints for Keyword Research (metrics, discovery), Backlinks (summary, lists, historical), Domain Data, On-page, Competitive Research, and Project Management.

name: Ahrefs
oneLiner: Ahrefs API v3 provides programmatic access to a wide range of SEO data, including organic and backlinks data from Site Explorer, keyword metrics from Keywords Explorer, Google SERP data, and data from user's Rank Tracker and Site Audit projects.
apiSurface: REST API (v3) with 105 API methods covering Site Explorer, Keywords Explorer, SERP Overview, Rank Tracker, Site Audit, Brand Radar, Batch Analysis, Social Media Management, and Subscription information.

name: MrScraper
oneLiner: MrScraper is an AI-powered web scraping platform that allows users to extract structured data from websites using natural language prompts, offering a Web Scraper API with features like rotating proxies and anti-bot handling.
apiSurface: REST API designed to run AI-powered scrapers, extract data, and handle web content, supporting single-page and multi-page scraping.

name: Apify
oneLiner: Apify is a platform that provides programmatic access to its tools for web scraping and automation, allowing users to run Actors, manage datasets, and interact with webhooks via a REST API.
apiSurface: REST API (version 2) providing programmatic access to Actors, datasets, key-value stores, and webhooks, with an OpenAPI schema available.

name: Firecrawl
oneLiner: Firecrawl is an API service that scrapes, crawls, and extracts structured data from any website, providing LLM-ready output for AI applications, and allows interaction with web content at scale.
apiSurface: REST API with endpoints for scraping single URLs, batch scraping, crawling multiple URLs, managing crawl jobs, and interacting with scraped pages, providing Markdown or structured data output.

name: Bright Data
oneLiner: Bright Data is a web data platform offering a proxy network, 700+ pre-built scrapers, datasets, and AI-ready APIs for collecting, processing, and scaling access to public web data.
apiSurface: Extensive REST APIs including Web Access APIs (covering 700+ scrapers), Crawl API, SERP API, Browser API, and Social Media APIs.

name: Sherlock
oneLiner: Sherlock is a Python command-line tool that finds usernames across many social networks.
apiSurface: CLI tool for searching usernames across social networks. Not a traditional REST/GraphQL API.
blocker: Not a traditional API; requires executing a command-line interface.

name: Waterfall.io
oneLiner: Waterfall.io provides an API to find and enrich contacts, prospect by title and company, and verify emails.
apiSurface: REST API for various contact and company intelligence operations, including finding and enriching contacts, prospecting, and email verification.
blocker: Requires an API key which is not clearly self-serve obtainable; likely partner/contact-sales gated.

name: Clay
oneLiner: Clay is a data enrichment and automation platform that combines spreadsheets with web scraping and integrations.
apiSurface: Undetermined; no public API documentation found.
blocker: No public API documentation readily available; likely no public API or enterprise-gated.

name: GitHub
oneLiner: GitHub provides a REST API for programmatic access to repositories, issues, pull requests, users, and webhooks, enabling code hosting and collaboration.
apiSurface: Comprehensive REST API for managing various aspects of software development, including repositories, users, organizations, issues, pull requests, actions, packages, and more.

name: Vercel
oneLiner: Vercel is a cloud platform for frontend developers, offering tools for deploying and scaling web applications, with a REST API for programmatic control.
apiSurface: REST API for deploying, managing projects, domains, and serverless functions on the Vercel platform.

name: Netlify
oneLiner: Netlify is a web developer platform that automates web projects from Git to global deployment, offering a REST API for programmatic control over sites and deploys.
apiSurface: Comprehensive REST API for managing sites, deploys, forms, functions, and other platform features.

name: Cloudflare
oneLiner: Cloudflare provides a comprehensive suite of network services, including CDN, security, and DNS, with an extensive API for programmatic management.
apiSurface: Very broad REST API covering DNS, CDN, security, Workers, Pages, Stream, and many other Cloudflare services.

name: Supabase
oneLiner: Supabase is an open-source Firebase alternative providing a PostgreSQL database, authentication, instant APIs, and other backend services, accessible via its API.
apiSurface: Offers various APIs including a REST API for its PostgreSQL database (PostgREST), Realtime API, Auth API, Storage API, and Edge Functions.

name: Neo4j
oneLiner: Neo4j is a leading graph database platform that allows developers to model, store, and query connected data with native graph processing capabilities, offering various APIs for interaction.
apiSurface: Provides several APIs including the Cypher Query Language, Bolt Protocol, REST API (via HTTP API or Transactional Cypher Endpoint), and language drivers (e.g., for Python, Java).

name: Snowflake
oneLiner: Snowflake is a cloud data platform that provides data warehousing, data lake, data engineering, data science, and secure data sharing capabilities, accessible through various APIs.
apiSurface: Extensive APIs including SQL API, REST APIs, Snowpark API, and connectors for various programming languages and tools, allowing comprehensive data operations and platform management.

name: MongoDB Atlas
oneLiner: MongoDB Atlas is a global cloud database service for modern applications, providing a fully managed cloud database.
apiSurface: REST API for managing all MongoDB Atlas components, including clusters, projects, organizations, and access. It is broad and comprehensive.

name: Datadog
oneLiner: Datadog is a monitoring and security platform for cloud applications, offering observability for infrastructure, applications, and logs.
apiSurface: REST API, very broad, covering metrics, events, monitors, dashboards, and integrations for comprehensive platform management.

name: Sentry
oneLiner: Sentry is an error monitoring and performance monitoring platform that helps developers identify and fix issues in real-time across applications.
apiSurface: REST API, broad, for managing projects, events, issues, releases, and user feedback within the Sentry platform.

name: Notion
oneLiner: Notion is a workspace that combines notes, docs, project management, and wikis, allowing users to create flexible and powerful tools.
apiSurface: REST API, allowing to read, create, and update nearly everything in a workspace—pages, databases, users, and comments.

name: Airtable
oneLiner: Airtable is a low-code platform for building collaborative apps, blending spreadsheet simplicity with database power.
apiSurface: REST API for CRUD operations on records and a Metadata API for fetching table schemas, enabling comprehensive base management.

name: Linear
oneLiner: Linear is a fast and efficient issue tracking and project management tool designed for modern software teams.
apiSurface: GraphQL API, offering full support for querying and mutating all entities like issues, projects, teams, and users.

name: Jira
oneLiner: Jira is a project tracking software for agile teams, used for issue tracking, bug tracking, and project management.
apiSurface: REST API, very broad, covering issues, projects, users, workflows, and administration for extensive customization and automation.

name: Asana
oneLiner: Asana is a work management platform for teams to organize, track, and manage their work and projects.
apiSurface: REST API, broad, for managing tasks, projects, workspaces, users, and portfolios.

name: Monday.com
oneLiner: Monday.com is a work operating system (Work OS) that helps teams manage projects, workflows, and collaborate effectively.
apiSurface: GraphQL API, broad, allowing interaction with boards, items, users, and other platform features.

name: ClickUp
oneLiner: ClickUp is an all-in-one productivity platform for managing tasks, projects, and teams, aiming to replace multiple work apps.
apiSurface: REST API (v2), broad, covering spaces, folders, lists, tasks, docs, comments, and messages, with full user lifecycle management.

name: Coda
oneLiner: Coda is an all-in-one document platform that blends the flexibility of docs, spreadsheets, and apps, allowing programmatic interaction with docs, tables, and rows via its API.
apiSurface: RESTful API for managing docs, pages, tables, rows, formulas, and controls, with an additional Admin API for enterprise features.

name: Xero
error: Missing from batch response

name: Brex
oneLiner: Brex provides a financial platform for businesses, offering corporate cards, business banking, and expense management, with an API for automation of payments, reporting, and user/card management.
apiSurface: REST API with numerous endpoints for accounting, budgets, onboarding, payments, team, transactions, and webhooks, covering core financial and account management functions.

name: Ramp
oneLiner: Ramp offers a developer API to programmatically access financial data, automate card issuing, and integrate reporting for businesses.
apiSurface: Comprehensive REST API covering numerous domains like Accounting, Applications, Audit Logs, Authorization, Banking, Bills, Cards, and Users.

name: PitchBook
oneLiner: PitchBook provides access to extensive private market data on companies, deals, people, and investors through its API for CRM enrichment and ad-hoc research.
apiSurface: Broad RESTful API (v2) providing access to a wide range of data points including financing details, deal stock information, and AI-powered VC exit predictor data, across various entities.
blocker: API access is gated by sales/account manager and requires purchasing credits.

name: NotebookLM
oneLiner: NotebookLM Enterprise is an AI-powered research assistant that helps individuals and teams organize, summarize, and extract information from curated documents and sources.
apiSurface: No direct standalone API; functionalities are accessible programmatically as a data source via the broader Gemini Enterprise API, which offers comprehensive information retrieval, multi-modal content generation, and autonomous AI agent orchestration.
blocker: No direct, standalone API for NotebookLM; instead, it is integrated into the Gemini Enterprise platform.

name: Otter AI
oneLiner: Otter.ai is an AI-powered meeting assistant that records, transcribes, and summarizes conversations, now functioning as both an MCP client and server for AI applications.
apiSurface: REST API with endpoints for account & usage, projects, experiments, and MCP integration, enabling programmatic management of API keys and access to meeting results.

name: Fathom
oneLiner: Fathom is an AI-powered meeting assistant that records, transcribes, and summarizes video calls, offering a public API for developers to build workflows and integrations.
apiSurface: RESTful HTTP API and client SDKs (Typescript, Python) with modules to retrieve summaries, transcripts, and list recordings and team members.

name: Consensus
oneLiner: Consensus is a platform that allows users to search, synthesize, and build structured research outputs from over 220M+ peer-reviewed papers, with an API and MCP for AI assistants.
apiSurface: REST API primarily focused on searching peer-reviewed papers and accessing paper metadata, with an OpenAPI index available for AI agents.

name: Reducto
oneLiner: Reducto provides an agentic document platform with a Parse API that converts complex, messy business documents into structured, LLM-ready JSON data using layout-aware OCR and document intelligence.
apiSurface: REST API with a primary 'Parse' endpoint for document processing (OCR, layout detection, table reconstruction, chunking) and other capabilities like /extract, /split, /classify, /edit.

name: Devin
oneLiner: Devin is an AI code assistant that allows integration into applications, automation of workflows, and building of powerful tools, with capabilities like session management, knowledge, playbooks, and integrations.
apiSurface: REST API (v3) comprising an Organization API (for sessions, knowledge, playbooks, secrets) and an Enterprise API (for cross-organization management, analytics, audit logs, user management, billing, and infrastructure).

name: higgsfield
oneLiner: Higgsfield AI is a video generation platform that enables users to generate images, videos, 3D assets, and audio from the terminal using its CLI, and connect AI agents for content automation.
apiSurface: Primarily through a Command Line Interface (CLI) for generating images, videos, and other assets, also supporting an SDK for building integrated apps.

name: Mermaid CLI
oneLiner: Mermaid CLI is a command-line interface tool that converts Mermaid diagram definition files into various image formats like SVG, PNG, and PDF, and can also transform markdown files containing Mermaid diagrams.
apiSurface: Primarily a command-line interface (`mmdc`) with various options for input files, output formats, themes, and styling. It also offers programmatic interfaces in Node.js and a Python library wrapper for diagram generation.

name: YouTube Transcript
oneLiner: TranscriptAPI is a managed REST API that extracts transcripts and other data, such as search results and channel/playlist information, from YouTube videos, providing structured JSON output.
apiSurface: A REST API with multiple endpoints for extracting video transcripts, video information, searching YouTube videos, listing channel videos, searching within channels, and accessing playlist contents, returning data in structured JSON.

name: Grain
oneLiner: Grain is an AI notetaker and conversation intelligence platform that records, transcribes, and enriches meetings, offering an API for programmatic access to meeting data, including recordings, transcripts, and AI-generated notes.
apiSurface: A REST API enabling developers to read meeting data (recordings, transcripts, AI notes, participants), manage recordings (upload, update metadata, add/remove tags, control sharing), and receive real-time events via webhooks.
